title: sideroxylon retinerve
intro: Sideroxylon retinerve, also known as the yellow ironwood or yellow bulletwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sideroxylon retinerve include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional remedies in tropical regions, particularly in Southeast Asia.
